name: Shenzhen Sunnypol Optoelectronics Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Sunnypol Optoelectronics Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, and sale of LCD polarizers in China. It offers polarizers for LCDs and 3D glasses, protective films for FPD, and brightness enhancement polarizers. The company was founded in 2007 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.
